_meta.title: Neutral feeder / slot model — the shape every multi-material unit folds into
_meta.scope: cross-vendor (neutral target, not a wire format)
_meta.confidence: neutral model — a synthesis, not a wire fact; the per-vendor feeder facts carry the confidence

derived_from.source_note: Synthesis of ../../patterns/multi-material-feeders.md. Per-vendor feeder facts (fields exposed, richness) live in each protocols/<vendor>.md.

notes: Everything beyond the per-slot atom (remaining %, RFID uuid, dry-box) is optional and degrades — vendors disagree on what they expose.
Never reconcile vendor slot arithmetic to a shared index; keep `slot_key` opaque per adapter.

invariants: An opaque per-slot atom (all fields optional, degrade to null).
Capability classes keyed on presence, never a vendor name.
An opaque, adapter-owned slot_key (do not reconcile vendor global-slot arithmetic).

color.note: normalize at the boundary from RGB tuples / RRGGBBAA / #RRGGBB / 0.0-1.0 floats

source.note: provenance of the slot data (wire | RFID | user-assigned)

optional_slot_fields.note: grams; derive from remaining_pct x slot weight where only a % is exposed

capability_classes.note: orthogonal to a feeder — N hotends, not N slots -> 1 hotend

assignment.note: print-time color->slot / filament->tool assignment; the key to per-material accounting. Vendors name it ams_mapping / ams_mapping2 / slot_map / ams_box_mapping / extruder_map_table.
